description: A photograph of a single deer, likely a Roe Deer, standing on a rocky and sparse grassy hillside. The deer is light brown with a prominent pale rump patch, positioned facing away from the viewer but looking over its left shoulder. In the middle ground, a calm lake or pond is visible, bordered by dark green trees, consistent with coniferous or mixed forest. The background features rolling mountains or hills, some of which display patches of snow on their higher elevations. The sky is overcast with grey clouds.
